entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cultivated legume (Cajanus cajan) widely grown in India and susceptible to pod borers

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where pigeon pea is widely grown

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Pests including Helicoverpa armigera and Maruca vitrata that cause yield losses in pigeon pea

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A specific species of pod borer pest

entities.name: MARUCA VITRATA
entities.description: A specific species of pod borer pest

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to study the complete set of RNA transcripts in wild and cultivated genotypes

entities.name: CAJANUS SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: Wild-type relative of pigeon pea with high resistance to pod borers

entities.name: ICP-15761
entities.description: Wild-type accession of Cajanus scarabaeoides with high resistance to pod borers

entities.name: ICP-15738
entities.description: Wild-type accession of Cajanus scarabaeoides with high resistance to pod borers

entities.name: ICPL-332
entities.description: Cultivated pigeon pea genotype that is moderately resistant to pod borers

entities.name: ICPL-87
entities.description: Cultivated pigeon pea genotype that is susceptible to pod borers

entities.name: SIMULATED HERBIVORY
entities.description: Experimental condition mimicking pest attack using oral secretions

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA ORAL SECRETIONS
entities.description: The agent used to simulate herbivory in the study

entities.name: DIFFERENTIAL GENE EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to identify genes with significant changes in expression levels

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show significant changes in expression between genotypes or conditions

entities.name: CHLOROPLAST REPROGRAMMING
entities.description: The process of altering chloroplast functions in response to simulated herbivory

entities.name: CHLOROPLAST BIOGENESIS
entities.description: The process of chloroplast formation and development

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL METABOLISM
entities.description: The biochemical processes involving the synthesis and degradation of chlorophyll

entities.name: DEFENSE PATHWAY ACTIVATION
entities.description: The triggering of biological mechanisms to protect the plant from pests

entities.name: CHITINASES
entities.description: Defense genes that break down chitin in insect cell walls

entities.name: CYSTEINE PROTEASES
entities.description: Defense genes that degrade proteins using a cysteine residue

entities.name: ASPARTIC PROTEINASES
entities.description: Proteases that use an aspartic acid residue for catalysis

entities.name: PATHOGENESIS-RELATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins produced by plants in response to pathogens or stress

entities.name: ADAPTIVE EVOLUTIONARY TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics developed through evolution to adapt to environmental pressures
